title: stream.validate request

cache_scope.description: Base-analysis cache scope for dynamic=true only. full (default) caches the complete FSDB; range caches the normalized time_range. Omit this argument when dynamic=false.

channel.description: Action-specific channel input. Its type and accepted values are defined by this schema.

dynamic.description: Action-specific dynamic input. Its type and accepted values are defined by this schema.

line_limit.description: Limits returned evidence rows only, not scanning, aggregation, or the verdict; read completeness fields as well.

stream.description: Action-specific stream input. Its type and accepted values are defined by this schema.

begin.description: Action-specific begin input. Its type and accepted values are defined by this schema.

end.description: Action-specific end input. Its type and accepted values are defined by this schema.

time_range.description: Closed analysis interval. begin and end may be omitted independently to use the available waveform bounds.

time_unit.description: Interprets only unitless time numbers; it never overrides a time string that already has a unit.

description: Validate stream configuration and observed behavior; dynamic validation supports explicit full or range base-cache scope.
x-how_it_works: static validation 不建 base；dynamic:true 与 query/export 复用 cache_scope 选择的 base。
x-when_to_use: 提前发现错误信号路径和动态流行为问题。
x-arg_contract_notes: required: stream; cache_scope: full(default) / range only when dynamic=true
x-description-zh: 验证 stream 配置；动态验证可显式选择 full 或 range 基础分析缓存范围。

use_when: 验证 stream 配置；动态验证可显式选择 full 或 range 基础分析缓存范围。
do_not_use_when: 不要把本 action 用于 stream.config.load、stream.config.list 的业务目标；请改用列出的同域 action。
constraints: required: stream; cache_scope: full(default) / range only when dynamic=true
